since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.13%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.87% · BTC +2.06% · Gold +1.79% · Nasdaq100 +1.86%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.13%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.13%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CBRS is the standout at +12.36%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.37% at $127.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
